sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl.STRA No. 165 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.3745/2024 (exemption) 2. For hearing of Main Case 27.01.2026 None present This reference application is pending since 2024 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Today also the applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ashraf
